title:
Systems research helping to meet the needs and managing the
trade-offs of a changing world
abstract:
Facing the challenges of an increasing world population, a
changing climate and ever depleting resources, agricultural
is one of the few options for meeting the demand of food security. It is necessary to
apply a dynamic and systematic approach to effectively manage
the complex agri-eco production and green processing
systems. Indeed, farming systems approach for appropriate
technology development and simulation modeling is a result
of adopting the system thinking by the agricultural research community...
